items.name: sigwire
items.description: tail -f for signals. Every signal any process on the box raises — who sent it, who it hit, which signal, how it was raised (kill(2), the kernel, a POSIX timer), whether the target caught it and how long its handler ran, whether it tore a blocked syscall out with EINTR.
